title: Column Movement
excerpt: Hi there! I am currently working on making different boards that require different BOARD VIEWS, and it is a real pain to have to drag a column across, especially when there are many columns in the board. It would be AMAZ…

posts.author: OmarLupercio (Omar A. Lupercio)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I am currently working on making different boards that require different BOARD VIEWS, and it is a real pain to have to drag a column across, especially when there are many columns in the board. It would be AMAZING if there was a way to quickly move a column left or right in a specific BOARD VIEW that was other than by dragging it. I’ve spend hours simply making Board views just because i have to slowly drag one column at a time.

posts.author: Notsoaverage (Logan Laird)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Omar, same issue here! Multiple views for different types of team members to each work out of, but our board is wide. A simple “move to end of board” feature would help. The juice may not be worth the squeeze, development-wise, though.
